CustomField.formula: IF( AND(PHA__Document_Request_Due__c > DATE(1900,1,1),PHA__Document_Request_Due__c < TODAY()),true, IF( AND(Initial_Document_Request_Due__c > DATE(1900,1,1), Initial_Document_Request_Due__c < TODAY()), true, false))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If either initial document request due or Document Request Due is before today, this is checked.
CustomField.label: Doc Request Dates Passed
